headline: How Investors May Respond To Goldman Sachs (GS) Amid Inflation Jitters And Private‑Credit Risk Warnings
summary: In late February 2026, Goldman Sachs Group faced intense scrutiny as hotter‑than‑expected US producer inflation data and mounting worries over private‑credit vulnerabilities, highlighted by former CEO Lloyd Blankfein’s warning about hidden leverage, sparked broad risk aversion toward major banks. At the same time, Goldman was very active in debt markets, issuing a wide range of new fixed‑income instruments from short‑dated senior notes to long‑dated callable and floating‑rate structures,...
